brand.name: MurrayGreyTank
brand.tagline: The world's marketplace & knowledge hub for Murray Grey cattle genetics
brand.legal: Salt Lake City, Utah, USA · a Utah company
brand.titleLong: MurrayGreyTank — The Global Marketplace & Knowledge Hub for Murray Grey Genetics
brand.footerBlurb: the world's marketplace for Murray Grey cattle genetics
brand.description: Buy and sell Murray Grey cattle genetics — semen and embryos — and explore the breed's Australian origin story, foundation bloodlines, a live genetics price index, and translated global news. The central hub for the world's Murray Grey community. Free to list.

registry_names: Murray Grey Beef Cattle Society of Australia
vocab.help_nuance: Murray Greys are naturally polled cattle whose coat ranges from silver to dun to chocolate; they were developed in Australia's upper Murray River valley. Don't confuse them with other grey breeds (e.g. Grey Brahman or Charolais).
